schemas.definition: z.object({ totalLeadsBySource: z.array(z.object({ source: z.string(), count: z.number() })), leadToTrialConversionRate: z.number(), trialToEnrollmentConversionRate: z.number(), totalActiveEnrollments: z.number(), paymentStatusSummary: z.object({ pending: z.number(), paid: z.number(), partial: z.number(), waived: z.number() }) })
z.object({ leads: z.array(z.object({ leadId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), source: z.string(), status: z.string(), createdAt: z.string().datetime() })).max(5) })
z.object({ trials: z.array(z.object({ leadId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), programName: z.string(), trialDate: z.string().datetime() })) })
z.object({ payments: z.array(z.object({ paymentId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), programName: z.string(), amountDue: z.number(), enrolledAt: z.string().datetime() })) })
